name: Charming Push

spell.name: Charming Push
spell.duration: until the start of your next turn
spell.success: The target takes a –1 circumstance penalty to attack rolls and damage rolls against you.
spell.failure: The target can't use hostile actions against you.
spell.critical_failure: The target is stunned 1 and can't use hostile actions against you.

text: You push at the target's mind to deflect their ire. The target must attempt a Will save.
